---
title: "Kunstig neuron app til multipel klassifikation"
---

Herunder gives en gennemgang af hver af fanerne i [Kunstig Neuron App til Multipel klassifikation](https://apps01.math.aau.dk/ai/multi-neuron/){target="_blank"}. Du kan læse mere om matematikken bag [i noten om simple kunstige neurale netværk til multipel klassifikation](/noter/softmax/softmax.qmd){target="_blank"}.



<!-- ## <span class="toggle-icon">Data</span> {.collapsible} -->


## [Data]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}


::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include data.qmd >}}

{{< include next.qmd >}}

:::


## [Variable]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include target-variabel.qmd >}}

{{< include feature-variable.qmd >}}

{{< include next.qmd >}}

:::


## [Træning]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include startvaegte.qmd >}}

{{< include learning_rate.qmd >}}

{{< include antal_iterationer.qmd >}}

{{< include indstillinger.qmd >}}

{{< include train.qmd >}}

{{< include output_tabsfkt.qmd >}}

{{< include output_vaegte.qmd >}}

:::


## [Evaluering & Prædiktion]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include eval_pred_multipel_klassifikation.qmd >}} 

:::
